revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{redirects here|Template:Organization|the infobox|Template:Infobox organization}}</noinclude>{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
<!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} begin -->{{Ambox
| name = Cleanup reorganize
|type  = style
|image = [[File:Ambox rewrite.svg|40px|link=]]
|issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''may be in need of reorganization to comply with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout|layout guidelines]]'''. {{#if:{{{2|{{{reason|}}}}}}|The reason given is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{2|{{{reason}}}}}}}}'''}}
|fix   = Please help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} editing the article] to make improvements to the overall structure.
|removalnotice = yes
|cat   = Wikipedia articles needing reorganization
|date  = {{{date|}}}
}}<!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} end -->
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{redirects here|Template:Organization|the infobox|Template:Infobox organization}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} begin -->{{Ambox | name = Cleanup reorganize |type = style |image = [[File:Ambox rewrite.svg|40px|link=]] |issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''may be in need of reorganization to comply with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout|layout guidelines]]'''. {{#if:{{{2|{{{reason|}}}}}}|The reason given is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{2|{{{reason}}}}}}}}'''}} |fix = Please help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} editing the article] to make improvements to the overall structure. |removalnotice = yes |cat = Wikipedia articles needing reorganization |date = {{{date|}}} }}<!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} end --> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{redirects here|Template:Organization|the infobox|Template:Infobox organization}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} begin -->{{Ambox | name = Cleanup reorganize |type = style |image = [[File:Ambox rewrite.svg|40px|link=]] |issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''may be in need of reorganization to comply with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout|layout guidelines]]'''. {{#if:{{{2|{{{reason|}}}}}}|The reason given is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{2|{{{reason}}}}}}}}'''}} |fix = Please help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} editing the article] to make improvements to the overall structure. |removalnotice = yes |cat = Wikipedia articles needing reorganization |date = {{{date|}}} }}<!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} end --> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_reorganize here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_reorganize for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{{redirects here|Template:Organization|the infobox|Template:Infobox organization}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} begin -->{{Ambox | name = Cleanup reorganize |type = style |image = [[File:Ambox rewrite.svg|40px|link=]] |issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''may be in need of reorganization to comply with Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout|layout guidelines]]'''. {{#if:{{{2|{{{reason|}}}}}}|The reason given is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{2|{{{reason}}}}}}}}'''}} |fix = Please help by [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} editing the article] to make improvements to the overall structure. |removalnotice = yes |cat = Wikipedia articles needing reorganization |date = {{{date|}}} }}<!-- {{Cleanup reorganize}} end --> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
